mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_entries ( user_id, entry_date, original_text, corrected_text, feedback, word_count, mood, grammar_points, changes ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{entryDate}, #{originalText}, #{correctedText}, #{feedback}, #{wordCount}, #{mood}, CAST(#{grammarPoints} AS jsonb), CAST(#{changes} AS jsonb) ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, entry_date) DO UPDATE SET original_text = EXCLUDED.original_text, corrected_text = EXCLUDED.corrected_text, feedback = EXCLUDED.feedback, word_count = EXCLUDED.word_count, mood = EXCLUDED.mood, grammar_points = EXCLUDED.grammar_points, changes = EXCLUDED.changes
